summary: Set 067 Session 3 of 4: Experiment A - the controlled capability study from Set 065 forward-ab-design.md, run with the shipped ai_router/pull_verifier.py adapter (S1+S2). PRE-REGISTERED criteria (experiment-a-preregistration.md) before any data: H1 context-access, H2 provider-multiplicity, H3 routed unique-capability, H4 falsifier-coverage, with arms/metrics/noise-band/grading-rule/audit/decision-rule fixed. INSTRUMENT: 5 frozen 'numeric-toolkit' trees (buggy+fixed), 20 seeded defects across all 8 forward-ab-design classes (2 Critical, 2 novel controls), each labelled probeable/novel + in-snippet/cross-file (catalogue.json) + a pre-authored deterministic falsifier (falsifier_suite.py; 19/20 discriminate, D16 the documented non-discriminating latent control; coverage 0.95 ~ retrospective ~92%). ARMS: 2x2 context x provider (A1/A2 routed GPT/Gemini snippet-only; B1/B2 path-aware adapter GPT/Gemini whole-tree+probes), blind, single-round, reasoning held constant across the context contrast, K=3, 60 runs ~$1.38, every raw output persisted to disk first (L-064-3). PILOT first exposed a grading-validity flaw (routed scores hypothetical/snippet-leaked cross-file flags as catches) -> restructured Tree 3 so its defects live in the omitted analyzer.py, scrubbed a Tree-2 leakage comment, corrected in-snippet/cross-file labels, and added a pre-registered manual-audit override layer (audit.json). VERDICT (audited, vs criteria): H1 CONFIRMED (B1-A1 +0.306, B2-A2 +0.361 weighted, both >> noise band 0.08/0.11, gains 100% cross-file incl 2 Criticals D5/D9 path-aware-only; in-snippet defects show no context gain = built-in control); H3 routed unique-capability RULED OUT (routed-pair MINUS path-aware-pair = empty; only the cadence defense survives -> Set 068 Experiment B); H2 the edge is CONTEXT-ACCESS not provider-multiplicity (a 2nd routed validator added +0.0; path-awareness added +0.306 beyond); H4 falsifier coverage 19/20=0.95, the 1 non-probeable (D16 latent dead branch) caught only by agent reasoning -> contract-test gate carries the bulk, agents for the novel residual (068). => path-aware CAPABILITY CONFIRMED -> S4 wires the opt-in automated path-aware-critique.json producer. No production code changed; no release this session (PyPI bump is S4). VERIFICATION: gpt-5.4 cross-provider of the ANALYSIS (the inference, not the wet-lab), R1 VERIFIED - confirmed H1/H2/H3/H4 follow from the data under the pre-registered rule and the load-bearing manual audit is defensible (not outcome-driven); 3 Minor wording/consistency fixes (B2 misses D16 so not strictly lossless; tie H2 to the noise-band rule; do not narrow the prereg audit scope) ALL applied. Verify spend ~$0.298.

reason.specifics: Routed rec (gemini-pro): Session 4 is production-code + release-engineering work (wire the opt-in path-aware-critique.json producer CLI/seam, docs, finalize tests, ai_router PyPI release via the publish runbook, change-log, route 068, dogfood the set's own pathAwareCritique:required gate, close the set). The incumbent has full Set-066/067 + adapter + artifact-contract context and release-runbook familiarity; effort=medium for procedural release-engineering.
